full_text:
Wang Chang (Wenshu) 王昶 (文舒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Chang (王昶), styledWenshu (文舒), was born in Taiyuan. Compiled treatises on government and military matters. Leading general against Wu. Wang Chang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wang Chang lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
